source_family_reports.detail: Held-out benchmark material remains isolated for broader pretraining evaluation.
Broader run keeps prose slightly ahead while reducing train loss materially.
Broader run preserves heavy spec coverage alongside the prose anchor.
Validation prose stays slightly dominant for broader-run reasoning checks.
Validation spec coverage remains high so interpretation drift is visible.

replay_receipt.summary: Broader run replay checks matched the tokenized-corpus contract across three recovery rehearsals.

pretrain_stage_receipt.summary: Broader Psion pretrain stage scales the explicit next-token lane onto the internal compact decoder while preserving replay and checkpoint lineage.

cost.detail: Broader run cost reflects metered trusted-cluster accelerator time plus checkpoint storage and east-west traffic.

checkpoint_artifact.detail: Broader run artifact surface includes sharded weights, optimizer state, and receipt/descriptor sidecars.

training_recovery.detail: One worker rejoined after a short topology churn event during the broader run.

training_collective.detail: Tensor-parallel gradient reductions stayed on the justified int8 collective lane.

hardware_topology.detail: Broader pretraining run preserved explicit tensor-sharded cluster topology and recovery facts.

observability_receipt.summary: Broader pretraining observability receipt records scale-up throughput, metered cost, checkpoint size, cluster topology, and structured instability markers.

mode_evaluations.detail: Single-region on-demand rented clusters stay within the bounded runbook when checkpoint persistence and cold restore are green.
Single-region spot capacity is allowed only on explicit resume-from-last-stable-checkpoint posture.
Cross-region ephemeral clusters are refused because mixed-latency recovery and storage-loss risk are outside the bounded runbook.
Untrusted shared clusters are refused rather than backfilling trusted-cluster claims onto rented infrastructure.

rented_cluster_runbook.summary: Rented-cluster runbook freezes storage persistence, preemption downgrade, cost stop conditions, and explicit refusal on unsupported infra modes before broader cluster work.

mode_evaluations.detail: The first trusted-cluster lane is one homogeneous H100-class CUDA rank per node over trusted-LAN stream transport.
Mixed backend or accelerator meshes are refused instead of pretending collective and throughput behavior generalize automatically.
Cross-region or mixed-latency fabrics are refused because the first truthful lane is bounded to one trusted low-latency cluster.
Elastic world-size increase remains out of scope for the first trusted-cluster lane; recovery is same-world-size restart only.
Shared or untrusted fabrics are refused rather than widening this lane into public all-reduce claims.

topology_contract.summary: Trusted-cluster Psion scale-up is bounded to one homogeneous four-node CUDA H100 tensor-parallel lane with one rank per node, trusted-LAN stream transport, explicit NCCL-class public group truth, and explicit refusal or out-of-scope posture for mixed, cross-region, shared, or elastic-world-size modes.

distributed_group.summary: Train-owned distributed-group receipt freezes the bounded NCCL-class trusted-LAN stream mesh that the trusted-cluster lane requires from public distributed-group truth.

transport_feedback.detail: trusted-cluster stream fabric stayed healthy during the bound sync

collective.detail: AllReduce collective planned over global mesh on mesh `psion-broad-mesh` revision 1

optimizer_state_restart.summary: Dense optimizer-state restart preserves exact parameter-group order and sampling cursor binding for the broader run.

checkpoint_artifacts.summary: Dense checkpoint artifact preserves one pointer-first last-stable fallback for the trusted-cluster lane.

checkpoint_context.detail: Trusted-cluster checkpoint artifacts preserve the source checkpoint topology and realized multi-host hardware topology separately.

optimizer_state_restart.summary: Sharded optimizer-state restart preserves group order, step identity, and sampling cursor binding across four trusted-cluster shards.

checkpoint_artifacts.summary: Sharded checkpoint artifact freezes the supported four-worker trusted-cluster restart path.

attempts.detail: pointer lookup selected a durable manifest for restore

recovery_events.summary: Forced interruption restarted from the trusted-cluster dense fallback artifact.

corruption_receipt.summary: Sharded trusted-cluster checkpoint corruption blocked continuation and forced rollback to the dense last-stable artifact.

recovery_events.summary: Manifest corruption triggered rollback to the trusted-cluster dense last-stable artifact.

corruption_receipt.summary: Optimizer-state corruption invalidated the trusted-cluster run instead of resuming from a poisoned state.

recovery_events.summary: Optimizer-state corruption invalidated the trusted-cluster run instead of continuing.

checkpoint_recovery_bundle.summary: Trusted-cluster checkpoint recovery bundle freezes dense fallback, distributed restart, corruption rollback, and invalidation on the broader four-worker run.

replay_receipt.summary: Trusted-cluster replay receipts cover all four worker identities and preserve exact replay across repeated multi-host checks.

summary: The first bounded trusted-cluster Psion run bundle ties together the broader-stage receipt, broader-run throughput and topology receipts, bootstrapped public distributed group truth, optimizer-step evidence, multi-host replay verification, and checkpoint restart coverage on one explicit four-node trusted cluster lane.
